item.title: Keep It Simple Stupid?
item.description: Chess I hit my personal best 5 min Puzzle Rush score of 13 today. More importantly, I’m delighted to use one of the Queen sacrifice tactic to win a blitz match today. :party: Though my overall rating is stagnating towards 850 this week, I’m fairly happy with the progress I’m making. Need to focus on improving my accuracy and middle game. What brought me joy today? Nakamura for putting up a fight till the literal last breath of the Magnus Carlsen Chess Tour Finals.
